evals.name: edit-targeted-change
evals.prompt: Edit the file /tmp/test-config.txt to change the timeout value from 30 to 60 seconds. The file contains: 'timeout = 30' on its own line.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses edit tool with unique anchor 'timeout = 30', verifies result
expectations: Verifies the change was applied correctly

evals.name: edit-ambiguous-anchor
evals.prompt: Edit /tmp/test-duplicate.txt to change the first occurrence of 'status = pending' to 'status = active'. The file has multiple lines with 'status = pending'.
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes ambiguity, refuses or asks for clarification rather than using a non-unique anchor
expectations: Does not use edit with a non-unique anchor
Either refuses with explanation OR uses bash to identify the specific line first
Does not silently edit the wrong occurrence

evals.name: write-large-deletion-copy-on-write
evals.prompt: Delete the entire 'Troubleshooting' section from /tmp/test-guide.md. The section starts with '## Troubleshooting' and ends before the next '## ' header.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses copy-on-write protocol: maps structure, creates backup, writes to temp, verifies, then swaps
expectations: Uses grep to map section boundaries
Performs atomic mv to replace original

evals.name: write-merge-files
evals.prompt: Merge /tmp/file-a.txt and /tmp/file-b.txt into /tmp/merged.txt. File A has sections 1-3, File B has sections 2-4 with some overlap.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses copy-on-write protocol for the merge, defines merge policy, writes to temp, verifies

evals.name: refuse-ambiguous-intent
evals.prompt: Clean up the messy file /tmp/messy.txt. Make it better organized.
evals.expected_behavior: Refuses because intent cannot be stated in one sentence
expectations: Asks for clarification on what 'clean up' means

evals.name: refuse-unknown-structure
evals.prompt: Delete the 'deprecated API' section from /tmp/no-headers.txt. The file has no clear headers or section markers.
evals.expected_behavior: Refuses or treats entire file as single section requiring full-read mode
expectations: When none found, either refuses OR reads entire file
Does not guess at section boundaries

evals.name: new-file-direct-write
evals.prompt: Create a new file at /tmp/new-config.yaml with the following content: server: localhost, port: 8080.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses write directly without safeguards since file doesn't exist

evals.name: concurrency-mtime-check
evals.prompt: Edit /tmp/concurrent.txt to append 'modified by agent' at the end. The file may be changing during the operation.
evals.expected_behavior: Records mtime before and after, aborts if changed
expectations: Checks mtime again before atomic swap
Aborts and re-reads if mtime changed
